DD1No. 1995(3)/STAFT. GEN(2).1LIn exercise of the Facts conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 52 of the Small Industries Development Bank of India Act, 1989 (39 of 1989) the Board of Directors of Small Industries Development 1Thi tti India hereby makes the following amendments io the Small tfulu§ties Development Bank of India Employees' Gratuity and Supdrannuation Fund Regulations, 2000, namely sr- (1) These regulations may be called the Small Industries Development Bank of India Employees' Gratuity and Supemnuation Fund (Amendment) Regulations, 2002. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. In the Small Industries Development Bank of India Employees' Gratuity and Superannuation Fund Regulations, 2000 (hereinafter referred to as the principal regulation) : In Regulation 2 of the principal regulation :— GO for clause (d), the following shall be substituted. namely :— (ct) "Superannuation benefits" do not include contributions to the Industrial Development Bank of India Employees' Provident Fund or the Small Indust ties Development Bank of India Employees' Provident Fund, as and when it comes into force, as the case may be or the Small Industries Development Bank of India Pension Fund. in Regulation 3 of the principal regulation :— in clause (a) the word 'pension' shall be deleted. (h), clauses (C), (d) and (e) shall be omitted. (ii). in sub-clause (iii) of clause (f), the word 'pension' shall be deleted. sub-clause (a) of Regulation 6, shall be omitted. P. B.
